goal: Drop AI-written heartbeat anti-pattern. lib/team/worker-loop.cjs writes last_heartbeat at top of each iteration via updateStatus() — wasted I/O AND misleading (tracks worker-loop cadence not codex liveness; loop blocks on codex's runSubprocess await for the whole task duration). Per memory project_log_inference_liveness: liveness inferred from log.jsonl mtime + last subproc-stderr ts. Fix: (a) drop last_heartbeat write from worker-loop, (b) gad team status HB(s) computes from log.jsonl mtime instead, (c) GAD TUI workers panel tails log.jsonl + status from there. Operator quote 2026-04-22: 'I didn't want the AI personally writing a heartbeat. that is inefficient. but honestly if you just launch a fleet and can see them interactively in the GAD TUI we should be monitoring via that.'
